# Compvide

> Compvide is a biotechnology company specializing in functional complement assay development, clinical sample analysis, and complement diagnostics. The company develops the proprietary CIMED diagnostic platform.

## Core Products and Services

- [CIMED Diagnostic Platform](https://www.compvide.com/cimed): Pathway-specific ELISA kits (CIMED-AP, CIMED-CP, CIMED-LP) for complement activity measurement and drug monitoring
- [Complement Assay Platform](https://www.compvide.com/platform): Custom assay development, clinical study support, biomarker programs
- [Biological Samples](https://www.compvide.com/samples): Certified human complement serum and plasma for research

## About

- [About Compvide](https://www.compvide.com/about): Leadership team and scientific advisory board
- [Partners](https://www.compvide.com/partners): Collaboration with pharma, biotech, and academic institutions

## Contact

- [Contact Us](https://www.compvide.com/contact): General inquiries
- [Request CIMED Access](https://www.compvide.com/cimed/request-access): Product access requests
- Email: info@compvide.com
- Phone: (206) 350-6075
- Address: 879 Rainier Ave N, STE A103, Renton WA 98057
